title: SPATAI â AI Assisted Surround Sound Tool | sonicLAB
text:
← Back to Products
New Release
SPAT
AI
AI assisted surround sound tool
VST3, VST2, AU and standalone
Designed and programmed by Sinan Bokesoy,
in collaboration with Daito Manabe and Thierry Coduys.
First release 02/2026.
Purchase for macOS / Windows
Overview
A unique AI assisted
surround sound tool
SPATAI
is a utility software that offers
Large Language Model AI
              assistance to move sound objects
in a virtual 3D acoustic space.
It translates in real time the movement of multiple objects in cartesian or
              polar coordinates and sends this movement data to other 3D audio spatialization software.
SPATAI is designed to overcome the creative limitations of traditional
              slider-based L/R, F/B, Elevation controls.
How It Works
SPATAI can use Cloud based LLM (consumes tokens) or Local LLM (hosted with Ollama or LMstudio) directly running on your computer.
Describe motion,
let AI build it
The user inputs
a descriptive text prompt to define a complex movement
.
              SPATAI then translates this prompt into the corresponding motion script.
Example prompt
“Distribute objects randomly in space, and move them each around
                the elevation axis in circles.”
Watch
See SPATAI in action
Capabilities
Create motions impossible
to do by hand
SPATAI
creates complex motion of multiple objects with AI. It then communicates
          with third-party applications via OSC or MIDI to send each movement on a time line.
SPATAI does not encode ambisonic audio or render digital audio in any format —
          it creates the motion data compatible for other third party software.
01
AI Motion Design
Prompt-based AI motion generation for complex spatial trajectories
02
64 Objects
Up to 64 objects with coordinated movement in 3D space
03
Coordinate Systems
Supports both Cartesian and Polar coordinate systems
04
Real-time Macro
Real-time macro controls acting on LLM motion script
05
Transport Control
Playback controls for defined region with timeline scrubbing
06
OSC / MIDI Output
Flexible output via OSC or MIDI to any compatible destination
Integration
Bridges with
leading spatial tools
SPATAI can support any destination with OSC. More targets will be added over time
              and SPATAI will grow without any third-party dependency.
Supported destinations
IEM
Holophonix
IRCAM SPAT
IRCAM Panoramix
Yamaha AFC
L-acoustics
TimaxSpatial
ADM-OSC
Cosmosf
SpatRevolution
SPATAI bridging with the legendary spatial tool IRCAM Panoramix
Token System
Using Cloud LLM ?
Pay as you go;
or use Local LLM on your machine
For Cloud LLM users, SPATAI creates a token account for each user with a default deposit of
500,000 tokens
. Each prompt submission consumes tokens.
Local LLM on the machine users do not need tokens. In any case there are
no subscription fees
.
All presets are self-contained and can be used without consuming tokens. Tokens are only deducted when a custom prompt is submitted.
Authorization
Simple serial code
activation
SPATAI requires a unique serial code authorization for each computer.
          Your serial code will be delivered automatically upon purchase.
Purchase SPATAI
All Products →
